data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering, but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case describes the capabilities available to the partner-built retention agent, it does not explicitly demonstrate that permission filtering is applied on a per-tenant or per-scope basis. The evidence only indicates which capabilities are available without detailing the filtering mechanism, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence demonstrating per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
